Your email list should be working harder for you
Stop juggling complex marketing tasks when you could be writing, teaching, and creating. Kit automates your email marketing so
you can get back to doing what you love.

For over a decade Kit is the platform experts use to scale their knowledge, serve their community, and grow their revenue without burnout.
Start free trial
No credit card required
Focus on what you love, automate more with Kit
Jump to features
Grow your email list, not your to-do list
Your expertise deserves a bigger audience. Reach more people and grow your list on autopilot with
no-code landing pages, opt-in forms, and newsletter recommendations.
Start free trial
No credit card required
Sell more without being salesy
Kit’s tags and segments help you organize your audience based on their interests so the
right people get the right message at the right time
.
Build once, benefit forever
Automations welcome new subscribers, nurture relationships, and
drive sales 24/7
. It's like having another “you” in your business.
Reach more people with every email
With an industry-leading
99.8% delivery rate and average open rates above 40%
, your carefully crafted emails land in inboxes, not spam folders.
Keep your audience, no matter what
Algorithms change. Platforms disappear. Your email list stays with you.
Build on land you own
, not land you rent.
Start free trial
No credit card required
The email marketing platform for creators who mean business
Start free trial
No credit card required
Email marketing
Reach your audience with personalized, engaging emails.
Newsletters
Write and design newsletters that build loyal fans.
Visual Automations
Build email sequences and workflows with drag-and-drop simplicity.
Forms & opt-ins
Capture subscribers with customizable opt-in forms.
Segmentation & Tagging
Organize subscribers for targeted, relevant messaging.
Landing Pages
Build beautiful customized website pages that convert.
Recommendations
Grow subscribers by cross-promoting with other creators.
Kit App Store
Connect all your tools so everything works together seamlessly.
Analytics & Insights
Track growth with actionable audience insights.
Email A/B testing
Optimize email conversions with data-driven split testing.
Sponsorships & Newsletter Sponsorships
Monetize your newsletter with premium brand partnerships.
Commerce
Sell digital products, memberships, and subscriptions directly through Kit.
Show more features
Smart apps that connect your creator tools directly to Kit
Your personalized hub for streamlining your business and creative workflows.
Start free trial
No credit card required
Your personalized hub for streamlining your business and creative workflows.
Shopify
Grow Your Creator Business, Automate Your Marketing, and Drive More Sales
+
Canva
Get access to your Canva library natively within the Kit media gallery
+
Circle
Connect Kit with your Circle Community.
+
GIPHY
Get access to the world's largest library of free GIFs, Clips, & Stickers.
+
SavvyCal
Embed beautiful booking links in your Kit emails. Perfect for coaching calls and webinars.
Custom Fonts
Use custom fonts in your emails by dynamically rendering them as images
Lex
Write something great today. We'll analyze your style and create custom prompts for you.
Senja
Add your text and video testimonials to your Kit emails. Increase your sales.
Sponsy
Connect your ad inventory from Sponsy straight to Kit
Transistor.fm
Embed great-looking podcast players into your Kit emails, linked to a playable web page.
Linktree
Sync contact lists seamlessly between Linktree and Kit
Thinkific
Create online courses, digital products, and communities that actually sell.
See all apps
Experts use Kit to build relationships and revenue
When I first announced the book on Instagram, it had a little bump in pre-order numbers, but when
I sent an email to my list using Kit—that's when we started to see some real movement
.
Nisha Vora
NYT bestselling author of
Big Vegan Flavor
It's built for creators. You can tell when you're using the platform that
they want you to make money from your email list
, and they want to make it as easy as possible for someone who's not super technical.
Terry Rice
Podcaster, consultant, and author
Our business would NOT exist without Kit. In fact,
we wouldn't be Sunday Times bestsellers of our book,
Financial Joy
, without Kit
.
Ken & Mary Okoroafor
Bestselling authors and founders of
The Humble Penny
Kit is integral because it's the
hub of the business
.
Eddie Shleyner
Author of
Very Good Copy
We recently launched a new onboarding sequence to identify pain points and have a targeted welcome sequence based on those pain points. It's been hugely successful.
We saw a 30 percent growth in the sale of the two products
we feature in those sequences over the last three months.
Katelyn Bourgoin
Founder of the Why We Buy newsletter
22,000 subscribers have come from Recommendations
and it is one of the best things that has ever happened to my newsletter.
Dan Go
High performance coach
Thanks to the fact that we sell our own product through our email list now, I have
the freedom to live, learn, and teach on my own terms
, which is the thing I care about.
Ali Abdaal
NYT bestselling author of
Feel-Good Productivity
I like that
Kit is intuitive
and I can do things myself; it makes me feel closer to my business.
Dorie Clark
Wa

Create a newsletter feed & website
Create a mini website with your Creator Profile to host all your newsletter content, links, products, and more.
Landing page and form templates
Whether you're creating a landing page or a form, we have a library of beautiful customizable templates to help you get started.
Customizable domain

We’re here to help you grow your audience. So share your ideas with the world. Our servers can handle it.

Get a free SparkLoop plan (worth $99/mo) to build a reward referral program to drive newsletter growth.
-
-
Subscriber management
Subscriber tagging
Tag subscribers by entry point, interest, actions, and any other way you want to organize subscribers on your email list.
Subscriber segmentation
Segment subscribers by grouping tags in the same category to personalize your communications.
Unsubscribe page builder
Create topics of interests and customize your unsubscribe page to reduce subscriber churn.
Users
The total number of users you can have on your account. Perfect for adding your team, with their own login, to support your marketing efforts.
1
2

Identify your highest-value subscribers for sponsor pitches, VIP offers, or re-engagement campaigns.
-
-
Send email campaigns
Send email broadcasts
Send or schedule one-time email campaigns or newsletters to your list.
Email template library
Use our email templates as a starting point to easily customize your email so it fits your brand and content.
Image library
Access to your own image library with photos you use often, Unsplash, and your own Instagram photos.
Create custom email templates
Create your very own custom email templates with HTML/CSS.
Conditional email content
Use Liquid to deeply personalize your content, showing different relevant content to different subscribers based on their tags.
Resend unopened campaigns
One-click to resend email campaigns to subscribers who have not yet opened the email to boost open rate and engagement.
A/B split testing
A/B test your email subject lines to see how you can improve your email open rates.

hits.title: ConvertKit: How Nathan Barry Bootstrapped an Email Marketing Business
ConvertKit refused to sell to Spotify for “hundreds of millions” in 2021
ConvertKit spent $64,944.78 on AWS in August
A full breakdown of ConvertKit's $64,944 AWS bill
$232,822 spent on AWS in Q3 – A full breakdown of ConvertKit's AWS bill

analysis.name: ConvertKit
analysis.tagline: Your email list should be working harder for you
analysis.value_proposition: Email marketing automation platform built for creators to grow their audience, automate their marketing, and earn revenue through digital products, paid newsletters, and sponsorships.
analysis.ideal_customer: Individual creators — authors, newsletter writers, coaches, course creators, podcasters, and YouTubers — who want to monetize an email audience

features.name: landing pages
features.description: Create unlimited hosted landing pages to capture new subscribers

features.name: forms
features.description: Embed or host unlimited opt-in forms to grow subscriber list

features.name: email broadcasts
features.description: Send unlimited one-time email newsletters to all or segments of subscribers

features.name: audience tagging
features.description: Apply tags to subscribers to organize and filter the list

features.name: audience segmentation
features.description: Segment subscribers into targeted groups for personalized sends

features.name: digital products
features.description: Sell digital products with automated fulfillment and low transaction fees

features.name: paid subscriptions
features.description: Sell recurring subscription access to newsletters or content

features.name: visual automations
features.description: Drag-and-drop visual workflow builder; 1 basic on free, unlimited on paid

features.name: unlimited visual automations
features.description: Remove the 1-automation cap and build unlimited automated workflows

features.name: email sequences
features.description: Automated drip email series triggered by subscriber actions or time delays

features.name: a/b testing subject lines
features.description: Split-test email subject lines to optimize open rates

features.name: a/b testing content
features.description: Split-test email body content in addition to subject lines (Pro only)

features.name: subscriber polls
features.description: Embed surveys and polls inside emails to gather subscriber feedback

features.name: white label branding
features.description: Remove Kit branding from emails and landing pages

features.name: app store integrations
features.description: Connect third-party creator tools via the Kit App Store

features.name: rss campaigns
features.description: Automatically send emails when new blog or podcast content is published via RSS feed

features.name: email support
features.description: 24/7 email support available on paid tiers

features.name: chat support
features.description: 24/7 live chat support available on paid tiers

features.name: priority support
features.description: 24/7 priority email and chat support, faster response times on Pro

features.name: unlimited team users
features.description: Add unlimited team members and collaborators to the account

features.name: insights dashboard
features.description: Analytics dashboard for tracking subscriber growth and revenue metrics

features.name: deliverability reporting
features.description: Detailed reports on email deliverability, bounce rates, and inbox placement

features.name: subscriber engagement scoring
features.description: Automatically score subscribers by engagement level to identify active vs cold audiences

features.name: collaborative editing
features.description: Multiple team members can co-edit emails simultaneously

features.name: facebook custom audiences
features.description: Sync subscriber segments to Facebook for retargeting ad campaigns

features.name: newsletter referral system
features.description: Built-in referral program to reward subscribers for recommending the newsletter

features.name: edit links in sent broadcasts
features.description: Edit or update hyperlinks in emails after they have already been delivered

features.name: creator network
features.description: Cross-creator recommendation network where creators grow email lists together by recommending each other
features.evidence_quote: Creator Network, where creators grow their email list together

features.name: paid recommendations
features.description: Earn money by recommending other creators' newsletters to your own audience
features.evidence_quote: Earn more on autopilot with your digital products, subscriptions, and Newsletter Sponsorships.

features.name: paid newsletter
features.description: Charge subscribers a recurring fee to access premium newsletter content
features.evidence_quote: Run a paid newsletter — Earn recurring income with newsletter subscriptions

features.name: email designer
features.description: Visual email editor with templates for creating branded email content
features.evidence_quote: Send beautiful emails that build relationships, not just revenue.

features.name: email deliverability
features.description: Infrastructure and tooling to maximize inbox placement rates
features.evidence_quote: Get your emails where they belong—in your subscribers' inboxes.

features.name: free migrations
features.description: Concierge migration service to move subscriber lists from competing platforms at no cost
features.evidence_quote: 14-day free trial. No credit card required. Free migrations.

features.name: kit mcp
features.description: Model Context Protocol integration enabling AI agents to interact with Kit workflows

features.name: kit app store
features.description: Curated marketplace of native app integrations for creator tools
features.evidence_quote: Connect your creator tools directly to Kit for easier workflows, longer creative flow

features.name: webhook support
features.description: Send real-time subscriber event data to any external webhook URL from automations
features.evidence_quote: Send real-time subscriber data to any webhook from Kit automations

features.name: automation rules
features.description: Simple trigger-action rules to automate subscriber management without full visual automations
features.evidence_quote: Automate your account with Visual Automations, Rules, Integrations, and RSS

features.name: subscriber importing
features.description: Import existing subscriber lists from CSV or other platforms
features.evidence_quote: Subscribers, forms, landing pages, tags, and importing.

features.name: affiliate management
features.description: Manage affiliate programs and track affiliate commissions for products
features.evidence_quote: Products, Tips, affiliates, and managing your payouts

features.name: tip jar / tips
features.description: Accept one-time tip payments from subscribers and fans
features.evidence_quote: Products, Tips, affiliates, and managing your payouts

features.name: payout management
features.description: Manage and receive payouts from digital product sales, tips, and sponsorships
features.evidence_quote: Products, Tips, affiliates, and managing your payouts

features.name: email templates marketplace
features.description: Library of pre-built email templates available for reuse

features.name: kit ai
features.description: AI-powered writing and optimization features integrated into the platform

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: GDPR-compliant data handling, subscriber consent management, and data deletion
features.evidence_quote: Account Info, Terms & Conditions, Billing, Data Security, & GDPR

features.name: data security
features.description: Security controls and protections for subscriber and account data
features.evidence_quote: Account Info, Terms & Conditions, Billing, Data Security, & GDPR

features.name: custom fonts
features.description: Use custom fonts in emails via dynamic image rendering workaround
features.evidence_quote: Use custom fonts in your emails by dynamically rendering them as images

features.name: kit api
features.description: Public API for building custom integrations and apps on top of Kit
features.evidence_quote: If you can't find the app you need, build your own or request one. Explore Kit API

features.name: giphy integration
features.description: Access world's largest GIF/sticker library natively within email composer
features.evidence_quote: Get access to the world's largest library of free GIFs, Clips, & Stickers.

features.name: canva integration
features.description: Access Canva design library natively inside Kit media gallery
features.evidence_quote: Get access to your Canva library natively within the Kit media gallery

features.name: pexels integration
features.description: Search and insert royalty-free stock photos directly inside Kit email editor
features.evidence_quote: Search and insert beautiful, royalty-free Pexels photos directly in Kit.

features.name: commerce
features.description: Unified commerce layer for selling products, subscriptions, and tips within Kit
features.evidence_quote: Sell digital products — Simple product pages, automated fulfillment, and low transaction fees

differentiators: Creator Network — cross-creator mutual recommendation system for organic list growth
Paid Recommendations — monetize your audience by recommending other creators' newsletters
Kit MCP — Model Context Protocol AI integration (newly launched)
Kit Studios — physical professional recording studios operated for Kit creators
Edit links in already-sent broadcasts (Pro tier)
Email-first operating system for creators — positioning vs generic email marketing tools
Built-in commerce (products, subscriptions, tips) without requiring third-party cart
Free migrations from any competing platform
Celebrity creator social proof at scale (James Clear, Tim Ferriss, Andrew Huberman, Ali Abdaal, etc.)

recent_ships.what: Unspecified major product announcement — live stream event scheduled June 11, 2026
recent_ships.source: Our biggest product announcement of the year. June 11, 2026. Register for live stream

recent_ships.what: Kit MCP — Model Context Protocol integration enabling AI agent access to Kit
recent_ships.source: Kit MCP listed as 'New' in primary navigation and features list on landing page

praised: Kit App Store integration ecosystem: 'The Kit App Store was honestly one of the reasons I switched to Kit. The ability to combine different software through my email system has been a game changer.' — Tim Mcburnie, Creator Coach
Strong creator brand trust evidenced by high-profile endorsements (James Clear, Tim Ferriss, Ali Abdaal, Andrew Huberman, Mark Manson, Ryan Holiday, etc.)
Nathan Barry's bootstrapped independence celebrated on HN: refused Spotify acquisition for 'hundreds of millions' in 2021
complaints: No G2 review data available — page did not load in provided sources
No HN or Reddit feature-level complaints surfaced in provided sources; HN discussions focused on business financials and founder story rather than product

free_tier.limits: up to 1,000 subscribers; 1 basic Visual Automation; no email sequences; Kit branding present; no integrations/apps

tiers.name: Newsletter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1,000 subs; 1 basic automation; unlimited landing pages, forms, broadcasts; tagging & segmentation; commerce

tiers.name: Creator
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1,000 subs; unlimited automations & sequences; A/B subject lines; polls; no branding; app integrations; RSS; 24/7 support

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1,000 subs; unlimited users; insights dashboard; deliverability reporting; engagement scoring; referral system; edit sent links

pricing.notes: Pricing is subscriber-count-based, not seat-based; prices scale up with list size beyond 1,000. Prices shown ($33/$66) are annualized monthly rates (yearly billing: Creator $390/yr saves $78, Pro $790/yr saves $158 — implying actual month-to-month rates of ~$39 and ~$79 respectively). No enterprise/contact-sales tier; Pro is the top tier. Annual billing advertised as '2 months free' (~17% discount).

recent_hn.title: Show HN: I've built email capture on a hosted page (no SDK/ESP setup)
